title: neottia bifolia
intro: Neottia bifolia, also known as the lesser bellwort or green Adder's-mouth, is a type of orchid native to woodland areas in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. Consuming Neottia bifolia has been reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Neottia bifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
